ba=nil q(p[19],1,function(a)local b,c local d={}local e={}local function f(g,h)e[h]=g;return e[h]end local g={}g[1]=4 g[2]=3 g[3]=1 local g=-33729 local h=0 local i=0 repeat if g>=-11724 then if g==-11724 then for i=0,3 do local j local k={}local l={}local function m(n,o)l[o]=n;return l[o]end local n={}n[1]=2 n[2]=2 n[3]=3 local n=0 local n=-27037 local o=0 repeat if n>=-27037 then if n<=-27037 then j=p[10](a,p[5][3])c=p[23][6](c,p[14][7](j,8*i))k[2]=l[-27037+143213]or m(-38790,-27037+143213)n=85186 else if n~=85186 then break else n=k[2]end end else if n<=-45954 then n=k[3]else do k[1]=p[5][3]+1 p[5][3]=k[1]end k[3]=l[-38790+143213]or m(75785,-38790+143213)n=-45954 end end until n==75785 end;return c*4294967296+b;else h,g=d[1],d[1]end else if g==-44066 then break else b=0 c=0 for c=0,3 do local a=p[10](a,p[5][3])b=p[23][6](b,p[14][7](a,8*c));p[5][3]=p[5][3]+1 end;d[1]=e[-33729+95298]or f(-11724,-33729+95298)h,g=44924,44924 end end until g==-44066 end)bv,bu=-35511,-35511 else do bs[4]={false,false,3914278,6911569,92036186,false}p[23]=bs[4]end do bs[5]={92069154,false,87731462,46675779,false,false,32582837}p[20]=bs[5]end bw,bu=-40352,-40352 end end end end end end until bu==36482 end)(error,next,string.match,tonumber,string.gsub,string.sub,table.insert,string.char,string.byte,coroutine.yield,coroutine.wrap,string.rep,table.concat,math.floor,select,(getfenv or function()return _ENV;end),setmetatable,next,(table.unpack or unpack),(table.pack or function(...)return{...};end),math.min,(function(b)if b<=1 then return false end;if b<=3 then return true end;if b%2==0 or b%3==0 then return false end;local c=5;while c*c<=b do if b%c==0 or b%(c+2)==0 then return false end;c=c+6 end;return true end),string.len,table.remove,table.sort,(string.unpack),string.gmatch,string.find,string.reverse,tostring,math.abs,rawget,string.format,type);
